title: [設計］pt poly award ? poly speed award?

replies.msg:
小弟多媒體設計小薯一粒，做左幾年野
近排工作穩定想讀返個degree
一黎想有返個大學學位
二黎想進修下，學多d野

收到兩個offer
Poly award: art and design in education
（讀既野同我既興趣&做緊既野無乜直接關係）

Poly speed award : media art
本科，但speed...

有冇前輩或者高人可以比少少意見，應該點簡好
我最在意既係兩科既師資係咪一樣
我上司同我講，做左幾年野，portfolio 重要過個學位係咪speed，學到野最重要
但我都係想聽多啲意見

art and design果個係sd既人教 會著重點用設計應用返落點教育同改變社會文化

Media art就著重Art方向多d 你有冇睇過課程有咩讀
個人覺得Meida art有用d 大部份課程係Art school教
利申:Speed

PolyU programmes offered through SPEED are PolyU award programmes as approved by PolyU Senate. The award and parchment of the PolyU programmes offered through SPEED are the same as that of other PolyU programmes.

https://www.speed-polyu.edu.hk/faq.php

Poly award尾班車
自己諗

PolyU programmes offered through SPEED are PolyU award programmes as approved by PolyU Senate. The award and parchment of the PolyU programmes offered through SPEED are the same as that of other PolyU programmes. ...................... 

.................The parchment of PolyU-SPEED award contains the PolyU logo only (without SPEED logo) while the full English name of PolyU and SPEED will also be printed 


https://www.speed-polyu.edu.hk/faq.php

我聽左佢最後果個問答大會，比我感覺係識人一齊搵野學咁，一班唔同既人group埋一齊，互相學習咁。
本身都覺得幾特別，但我最後都係簡speed，畢竟係我本科，睇佢既課程內容，有啲係我好想學既
